userMessage: I want a simple task tracker app where I can add tasks, mark them complete, delete them, filter by all/active/completed, and see a count of remaining active tasks. It should have a clean modern UI and work in the browser.
brainResponse:
To create a simple task tracker app with the features you've outlined, we can break down the requirements into a plan:

### Features:
1. **Add Tasks**: Users can input new tasks.
2. **Mark Tasks Complete**: Users can toggle tasks between active and completed.
3. **Delete Tasks**: Users can remove tasks from the list.
4. **Filter Tasks**: Options to view all, active, or completed tasks.
5. **Count Remaining Active Tasks**: Display a count of tasks that are still active.
6. **Clean Modern UI**: Focus on a user-friendly interface that is visually appealing.
7. **Browser Compatibility**: Ensure the app works seamlessly in web browsers.

### Next Steps:
1. **Planning**: We can draft a more detailed specification, including user interface sketches and technical architecture.
2. **Development**: Choose the technology stack (e.g., React, Vue, or plain JavaScript with HTML/CSS).
3. **Verification**: Plan for testing to ensure all features work as intended.
4. **Execution Proof**: Set up a process to demonstrate that the app can be built and run successfully.

Would you like to proceed with a more detailed plan or dive into any specific part of the development process?

testCases.description: Verify TypeScript compiles without errors after proposed changes
testCases.passCriteria: tsc --noEmit exits 0 with no new errors
testCases.failCriteria: Any new type error in proposed module surface

testCases.title: Foundation validation script
testCases.description: Run phase validation script with minimum scenario count
testCases.passCriteria: Validation script passes with pass token emitted
testCases.failCriteria: Any scenario failure or insufficient scenario count

testCases.title: Routing integration
testCases.description: Verify Command Center routes testing questions correctly
testCases.passCriteria: TESTING_RUNTIME_FOUNDATION is primary for success questions
testCases.failCriteria: Wrong capability primary or blocked advisory question

testCases.title: No file write guard
testCases.description: Verify testing runtime does not write test files to project
testCases.passCriteria: No writeFileSync, no spawn, no child_process in testing-runtime module
testCases.failCriteria: Any file write or command execution detected

testCases.title: Linkage integrity
testCases.description: Verify links to code generation, build task, and execution packet
testCases.passCriteria: linkedGenerationId, linkedBuildTaskId, linkedExecutionId populated; executionAllowed false
testCases.failCriteria: Missing links or executionAllowed true

testCases.title: Operator feed stages
testCases.description: Verify operator feed publishes full testing planning sequence
testCases.passCriteria: All TESTING_RUNTIME_FEED_STAGES published in order
testCases.failCriteria: Missing feed stage or wrong source system

testCases.passCriteria: tsc --noEmit exits 0 with no new errors
testCases.failCriteria: Any new type error in proposed module surface

testCases.title: Foundation validation script
testCases.description: Run phase validation script with minimum scenario count
testCases.passCriteria: Validation script passes with pass token emitted
testCases.failCriteria: Any scenario failure or insufficient scenario count

testCases.title: Routing integration
testCases.description: Verify Command Center routes testing questions correctly
testCases.passCriteria: TESTING_RUNTIME_FOUNDATION is primary for success questions
testCases.failCriteria: Wrong capability primary or blocked advisory question

testCases.title: No file write guard
testCases.description: Verify testing runtime does not write test files to project
testCases.passCriteria: No writeFileSync, no spawn, no child_process in testing-runtime module
testCases.failCriteria: Any file write or command execution detected

testCases.title: Linkage integrity
testCases.description: Verify links to code generation, build task, and execution packet
testCases.passCriteria: linkedGenerationId, linkedBuildTaskId, linkedExecutionId populated; executionAllowed false
testCases.failCriteria: Missing links or executionAllowed true

testCases.title: Operator feed stages
testCases.description: Verify operator feed publishes full testing planning sequence
testCases.passCriteria: All TESTING_RUNTIME_FEED_STAGES published in order
testCases.failCriteria: Missing feed stage or wrong source system
